## [00:00 - 03:00]

Whether that traffic comes from your list, it's purchase traffic, it's affiliate traffic, it's traffic that comes to your webinar signup page because they came to your website and they went from there. However that traffic comes in and we talk about that, everything I'm showing you here, we're going to talk about in a lot of detail. So you can rest assured if there's anything you don't understand here, you're going to understand it very, very well by the time we're done. So traffic that comes to a webinar registration page. If they register for the webinar, then we take them through promotional sequence to get them to actually attend the webinar. That's called the attendance promo. At the end of that, we give them the webinar. And the question is, what happened in relationship to that webinar? So let's assume that they attended the webinar and they bought your product. From there, they'll go through a checkout process that actually takes their money. And once we've checked them out, then we deliver the product over however, whatever amount of time it takes to deliver that product. And once we're done delivering that product, we then do what we call a re-nurture campaign. So we give them some more free stuff to get them feeling like we're not always selling them things. And then after that, we then put them into the next offer sequence where we're

## [03:00 - 06:06]

going to sell them the next thing. All right. So that's the ideal path. Traffic to webinar registration. Now let's go back to this question about the webinar itself. The next assumption is that they attended the webinar, but they didn't buy. All right. What do we do with them then? Well, the next piece in the webinar funnel formula is to give them a replay of the webinar. That replay enables them to see what we covered in the webinar in a video form as opposed to a webinar. So this is not an evergreen webinar where it looks, you can see all the comments and everything else like that. That's not what's happening here. This is a video replay of the webinar. If they buy on that webinar replay, they then go into checkout and continue on through product delivery and the re-nurture campaign in the next offer sequence. All right. If they didn't buy from the replay promo, we then send them to another promo, and this is something that most people don't do. we're still going to give them the opportunity to view the replay. Once they're in that portion of it, if they didn't buy, they're going to get the sales page promo and go forward with this.
